candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conviction but green_matches=0 (no historical analog), treat the signal as UNRELIABLE regardless of live bull/bear tally — historical hit-rate of 0% is a hard veto, not a soft discount.
testable_rule: if consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.conviction >= 0.60: veto_signal()  # only trade when green_matches >= 1 AND hist_hr > 0.50
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
